author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented inference_mode() and is_inference_mode(). Inference mode disables gradient tracking AND skips all autograd bookkeeping — from_operation() returns a plain tensor without grad_fn when inference mode is active. This avoids allocating Arc<dyn GradFn>, Mutex<grad>, and the full TensorInner overhead for inference-only tensors. RAII guard with panic safety. 4 tests. Exported from ferrotorch_core::autograd. 3649 total tests pass, 0 warnings.
